description: System rejects a .txt file upload with error: 'Unsupported file type. Please upload a PDF or DOCX file.'
System rejects a PDF larger than 25 MB.
System rejects an 11th document upload when workspace already has 10 documents.
After uploading Acme_2027_Benefits_Guide.pdf, AI extracts at least 7 business rules each with source page reference.
expectedOutcome: extractedRuleCount >= 7, all rules have sourcePageRef field populated

description: Extraction of the 12-page Benefits Guide completes in under 60 seconds.
expectedOutcome: lifecycleState transitions to EXTRACTED within 60 seconds of upload

description: After uploading both Benefits_Guide.pdf and Eligibility_Policy.pdf, system detects the waiting period conflict between BR-001 (30 days) and BR-002 (first of month following 30 days).
expectedOutcome: conflictCount >= 1; conflict shows both BR-001 and BR-002 with their source documents

description: When user asks 'What is the waiting period for new employees?', AI cites the specific document and section in its response.

testInputs.question: What is the waiting period for new employees?

expectedOutcome: Response includes citation to DOC-2027-0001 or DOC-2027-0002 with page reference; does not hallucinate a number not in the documents

description: AI flags the ambiguous use of 'promptly' in the notification policy and recommends a specific number of days.
expectedOutcome: ambiguityFlag detected on BR-007-AMBIGUOUS; AI recommends defining 'promptly' as a number of calendar days
